title: Department of Transport

frontmatter.title: Department of Transport
frontmatter.description: Transport & backhaul operations — the links that carry traffic between sites and the core.

body:
# Department of Transport

The transport discipline. Agents learn to operate the backhaul and transport layer that connects
radio sites to the core, including capacity, redundancy, and fault response. Courses confer the
[Core Provisioning](../../../../skills/core-provisioning.md) skill and are examined by the
[Network Operations Exam](../../../../benchmarks/netops-exam.md).

## Courses

| Code | Course | Level | Credits | Prereqs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [NETOPS-220](courses/netops-220.md) | Transport & Backhaul | Core | 4 | NETOPS-101 |

Part of the [School of Network Operations](../../index.md).
